holdings.infoBox: FDRR is an equity ETF with a total of 128 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.43%, Apple at 7.45%, Alphabet at 5.69%, Microsoft at 4.66%, and Broadcom at 3.93%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Dividend ETF for Rising Rates (FDRR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Fidelity Dividend for Rising Rates index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap companies in developed nations that exhibit strong dividend characteristics and have a positive correlation to increasing 10-year US Treasury yields. FDRR was launched on Sep 12, 2016 and is issued by Fidelity.
infoTable: Fidelity Dividend Index for Rising Rates
